name: screenshot_and_gate
description: Capture a real headless-Chromium screenshot of one client's rendered site preview (Playwright, not a fallback stub) and run a mechanical pass/fail render gate against it: viewport render success, no console errors, no broken images, a minimum rendered body text-length heuristic, and confirmation that both media_assets entries (audio from synthesize_voice, video from synthesize_video_intro) are present and non-empty. This is the mechanical half of voice_qa's structural_voice_match check for content_type: 'site' — it never evaluates tone, lexical fingerprint, or claim sourcing, and it is called exactly once per voice_qa pass, immediately before deployer may ever request approval. Fails clearly and loudly (fail-loud, non-retryable message identifying the missing precondition) when the Chromium browser binary is not provisioned (playwright install chromium was not run in this environment) rather than silently returning a degraded or fabricated 'passed' result — pyproject.toml must carry a playwright entry in its dev optional-dependency extra and the binary must be installed before this tool is ever invoked.

client_id.description: Client this screenshot/gate check is scoped to; threaded through to output and downstream fleet events. Never used to read or gate any other client's preview.

fleet_id.description: ID of the parent fleet run this check belongs to, for fleet event correlation.

build_id.description: The exact site_draft.build_id this check is gating. Must be the build just produced by builder for this client, never a stale prior build_id.

url.description: Live or locally-served preview URL of the rendered site to capture and gate, corresponding to this client's preview_dir for build_id. Must be reachable over HTTP(S) at call time.

media_assets.description: site_draft.media_assets to cross-check for presence/non-emptiness as part of the gate, verbatim from the site_draft artifact.

min_content_length.description: Minimum rendered body text length (characters) below which the gate fails as 'thin/blank page'. Defaults to 200 if omitted.

viewport.description: Optional viewport override for the Chromium capture. Defaults to a standard desktop viewport if omitted.

output_path.description: Optional filesystem path, scoped within this client's own preview_dir, to write the captured PNG screenshot to. Must not resolve outside this client's directory (FLEET ISOLATION).

passed.description: True only if every gate check passed: render success, zero console errors, zero broken images, content_length >= min_content_length, and both an audio and a video media_assets entry present and non-empty.

screenshot_path.description: Filesystem path of the captured PNG, when output_path was supplied or a default capture location was used.

failure_reasons.description: One entry per failed check, human-readable, so voice_qa can attribute the fail to structural_voice_match findings without re-deriving it.

usage.description: Local Playwright execution cost; no external API is billed by this tool, but wall-clock and any headless-runtime cost attribution is still tracked for fleet cost rollup consistency with every other manifest.
